steps.title: Follow the sequence
steps.content: The second sentence describes what phytoplankton do when alive: they absorb carbon through photosynthesis. The next sentence begins with what happens after they die, so the relationship is chronological.

steps.title: Reject non-temporal links
steps.content: A would introduce a specific detail of the previous point, B would create contrast, and C would create concession. The sentence needs a transition that marks the next stage in time. The answer is D.
